name: Emi Noir
description: Alt-aesthetic lifestyle creator with a calm but mysterious vibe. Emi Noir is known for her striking heterochromia — one blue eye and one green. She shares gym routines, cozy gaming nights, and relaxing tea ceremony moments. Her content blends soft aesthetics, quiet confidence, and a touch of anime-inspired mystery.
video_suggestions_requirement:
Avoid loud party scenes, crowded events, aggressive behavior, or overly chaotic environments.  AVOID videos with mens.
Prefer calm aesthetic settings such as gyms, gaming setups, cozy rooms, cafes, tea ceremonies, or soft lifestyle scenes. 
Focus on relaxed, stylish, or slightly mysterious vibes.
